meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Stefano Pasquali: Building Trustworthy AI for Finance
meta.description:
This session by Stefano Pasquali, SVP, Head of Financial Services at Domyn introduced Domyn's Sovereign AI architecture, a unified framework combining Knowledge Graphs, LLMs, and agentic reasoning to bring transparency, auditability, and trust to financial AI.

-----------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
